top_signals.title: Gold Declines as Renewed US-Iran Strikes Raise Rate-Hike Bets
top_signals.summary: Gold declined after the US and Iran exchanged strikes over the weekend, sending energy prices higher and once more raising the prospects for interest-rate hikes to combat inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: License plate cameras may be next target after Supreme Court reins in location tracking
top_signals.summary: If a warrant is ultimately needed for ALPR searches, experts say, it would radically limit how the networks of cameras can be used and would change modern policing.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
